src: ⚙️💻 A macOS app that makes it a breeze to manage multiple GitHub Actions runners in ephemeral virtual machines on a single host machine. The benefits are that runners can run in parallel, and each job runs in an isolated environment.
ja: 単一のホストマシン上でエフェメラル仮想マシン内の複数の GitHub Actions ランナーを簡単に管理できる macOS アプリ。ランナーの並列実行と各ジョブの隔離環境を実現。
